name: speclock
description: Stop AI from breaking code you told it not to touch. Enforces .cursorrules, CLAUDE.md, and AGENTS.md — not just suggests. Zero-config Guardian Mode, Universal Rules Sync, Drift Score, AI Patch Firewall, Spec Compiler, Code Graph. 51 MCP tools, 976 tests, 100% accuracy. Developed by Sandeep Roy.
